description: CompositionRed polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a fabric collar with contrasting yellow panel below the collar and tape detailing on the inseam, ribbed tipped cuffs, concealed short chest placket with tape detailing on the facing placket, embroidered logo on the upper left chest and right sleeve, brand tab appliqued on the left hemline and a vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGet ready for a clean sophisticated look in this red polo neck t-shirt from lee. The embroidered branding on the left chest adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3&rdquo , Shoulders-19"
